legs.label: Run
legs.description: Replay fixtures, starting with the frame-the-problem exemplar.
legs.lead: The proof starts from the worked trace.
beats: Runs or inspects the campaign records.
Keeps the exemplar grounded in real trace files.
Hands records to an independent grader.

legs.label: Grade
legs.lead: Condition five must be true in fact.
beats: Records grader identity and run id.
Classifies failures or stops on new classes.

legs.label: Write-back
legs.description: Write results back to the risk map and run records.
legs.lead: No hand transcription at the proof seam.
beats: Updates measured result fields through deterministic tooling.

legs.label: Advance/Hold
legs.description: Evaluate the five TESTING.md auto-advance conditions.
legs.lead: The contract routes clean cards live and exceptions held.
beats: Checks unclassified failure, regression, and independent grade.

legs.label: Held queue
legs.lead: The second human touch is held-card review.

legs.label: Register-live
legs.description: Register a proven play live and record built-by provenance on the Ledger.
